channel.title: editors on LunarWatcher
channel.description: Recent content in editors on LunarWatcher

item.title: Why I use Vim
item.description: There’s arguably more than enough of these posts on the internet as it is, but after reading this story, I felt inspired. Unlike that though, this is based on my actual experiences rather than that of a fictional character. I’ve also had this post in mind for quite some time, so I figured it might just be about time to get it out there. Disclaimer: My sense of time is trash.
